description: Deterministic BM25-only replay fixture for the #1833 CI quality gate. Reuses the audited corpus_v2 fixture corpus; relevance is declared per case as file globs (relevant_globs) resolved to chunk content_hashes at refresh time. No embedder is downloaded (embedding.provider=none); as_of is pinned far in the future so temporal decay is stable.

case_defs.name: en-security-mtls
case_defs.query_text: enforce STRICT mTLS via Istio PeerAuthentication

case_defs.name: en-cost-hpa-minreplicas
case_defs.query_text: right-size cluster by lowering HPA minReplicas

case_defs.name: en-observability-blackbox-exporter
case_defs.query_text: Blackbox Exporter over RUM for external availability

case_defs.name: en-postgres-unused-indexes
case_defs.query_text: write latency degradation from unused postgres indexes

case_defs.name: en-caching-maxmemory-policy
case_defs.query_text: set Redis maxmemory-policy and monitor evictions

case_defs.name: ko-security-access-key-leak
case_defs.query_text: AWS 액세스 키 유출 GitHub Actions 로그 노출 대응

case_defs.name: ko-cost-idle-ec2
case_defs.query_text: 유휴 시간대에도 EC2 비용이 내려가지 않음

case_defs.name: ko-k8s-pvc-expand
case_defs.query_text: PVC 용량 확장 절차 kubectl edit pvc

case_defs.name: ko-caching-sentinel
case_defs.query_text: Redis Cluster 대신 Master-Replica Sentinel 채택
